calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Beneficiaries Of Bypass Subtrust
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dixon appearing for and with Petitioner/Co-Trustee Curistine Schooley.
Ms Dixon presented a copy of the declaration filed this morning regarding identification of the heirs. Ms. Dixon presented 2 revised orders. The court indicated that both petitions would be granted subject to the examiners review of the orders.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

Petition For Order Determining Validity And
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Written Order Received

Petition For Order Determining Beneficiaries Of Bypass Subtrust
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Continued To Sep-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: KELLY DIXON, ATTORNEY FOR PETITIONER
Ms. Dixon had problem contacting heirs. but has now locatd all heirs and has the notices and declaration ready to file. ask for continuance until 9/10/07.
COMMISSIONER:DOROTHY MCMATH, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN CSR# 11722,CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:F. SMITH

MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dixon appearing for co-trustees. Counsel is waiting for family member contact information from Ms. Smith. Counsel is requesting for continuance. Matter is continued to 7/30.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Arias.

Petition For Order Determining Beneficiaries Of Bypass Subtrust

MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dixon appearing for co-trustees. Counsel has heard from one of the niece that she wanted more information and she has new addresses for some of the other relatives. Counsel will re-notice the relatives. Matter is continued to 5/7.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Order Determining Validity And
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Continued To May-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining Beneficiaries Of Bypass Subtrust
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Apr-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kelly Dixon (Counsel for Curtistine Schooley, Trustee).

The Court noted at the outset that notice was apparently not given to all intestate heirs. After further discussion, the matter was continued to April 2, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow sufficient time for Ms. Dixon to notice all intestate heirs of the pending petitions.

Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katie Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Jimmy Peralta; Court Examiner: None; Court Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

Petition For Order Determining Validity And
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Continued To Jan-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dixon appearing for co-trustees. Notice is a problem. This petition needs to be continued to after the hearing to determine entitlement in Trust B. Counsel asked for confirmation of appointment of the co-trustees today and have the amendment issue continued to after the hearing on Trust B. Court stated that notice is required to anyone who is affected. Matter is continued to 1/8/07. Hearing on 11/27 is also continued to 1/8/07 also. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
